# Regex fixtures for methodology hint: frontend-quality-rules
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — a trigger regex must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — no trigger regex may match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# False-fire guards (same substring traps as frontend-playwright)
NO_MATCH: tabulate the metrics for the quant engine
NO_MATCH: update the onboarding docs
NO_MATCH: paginate the results from duckdb
NO_MATCH: perform the database migration
NO_MATCH: transform the dataframe and reformat the output
# This repo is hook-heavy: a bare 'hook' token must NOT route frontend-quality here.
NO_MATCH: run the session-start hook
NO_MATCH: fix the skill-activation-hook
# 'interaction' must be UI-scoped — a backend 'interaction' must NOT route here.
NO_MATCH: refactor the database interaction layer
# General frontend prompts (web-interface-guidelines territory)
MATCH: fix the form accessibility
MATCH: improve the responsive layout
MATCH: a ui change to the sidebar
# React/Next prompts (react-best-practices territory)
MATCH: add a react component
MATCH: optimize the next.js bundle size
MATCH: the component re-renders on every hook update
# plural 're-renders' as a standalone token (no other trigger word present)
MATCH: stop the excessive re-renders
